source_jobs.title: Enterprise Solutions Architect
source_jobs.description:
Skyflow secures the flow of data across datastores, models, and agents. Enterprises turn to Skyflow as their runtime AI data control layer to protect sensitive data, enable safe AI deployment, and unlock full value from their applications, data platforms, and AI systems.

Skyflow is trusted by Fortune 500 enterprises, and leading SaaS companies in financial services, healthcare, retail, travel and hospitality.



Skyflow is headquartered in Palo Alto, California and was founded in 2019. For more information, visit www.skyflow.com http://www.skyflow.com or follow on X https://twitter.com/SkyflowAPI and LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/skyflow/.

 

About the Role:

Skyflow’s Solutions Engineering Team is looking for customer-focused Architects and Engineers who thrive in action-oriented environments and are ready to lead the charge in solving complex privacy challenges. As a trusted technical advisor, you will partner with enterprise customers to architect privacy-first solutions that integrate Skyflow’s Data Privacy Vault into their platforms.



In this role, you will be hands-on in guiding customers through technical evaluations, building tailored demos, and leading top-notch POCs. Your focus will be on driving results, ensuring that Skyflow’s solutions not only meet but exceed customer expectations for privacy, security, and compliance while empowering them to remain agile in a rapidly evolving landscape.



About You:

You are a self-driven leader with a passion for engineering privacy-first solutions. As a highly skilled Architect or Engineer, you thrive in fast-paced, customer-centric environments and are always looking for new challenges. You have extensive experience building and maintaining relationships with technical and product teams at large enterprises, both pre and post-sales. You excel at understanding the business and technical needs of customers, consistently delivering innovative solutions that drive success.



You are passionate about continuous learning, constantly staying up to date with evolving technology, and enjoy mentoring others across experience levels. You believe in fostering a culture of collaboration and growth, actively contributing to the success of your team and customers alike.



You will:

 - Technical Mastery & Learning:
   
   - Develop a deep expertise in Skyflow’s Privacy Vault and its integration into enterprise data architectures.
   
   - Stay current with architectural trends, cloud technologies, and API best practices, ensuring cutting-edge solutions for customers.
   
   - Master data privacy and “privacy by design” principles, becoming a go-to expert across industries.



 - Solutioning & Customer Engagement:
   
   - Architect tailored solutions that demonstrate how the Skyflow Privacy Vault fits into customer environments and drives measurable business value.
   
   - Lead technical evaluations, build customized demos, and deliver best-in-class POCs to showcase Skyflow’s capabilities.
   
   - Develop a deep understanding of customer business challenges, proactively offering solutions that enhance their data privacy, security, and compliance efforts.



 - Leadership & Internal Collaboration:
   
   - Collaborate with Skyflow’s product and engineering teams to translate customer needs into actionable product features and improvements.
   
   - Represent Skyflow externally, showcasing how we solve some of the most critical data privacy challenges in the world.
   
   - Mentor and guide junior team members, sharing knowledge and fostering a collaborative team culture.
     
     

You have:

 - Enterprise experience in pre-sales or technical customer-facing roles, with a focus on enterprise-level engagements.

 - Proven ability to lead technical discussions with Product Managers, Developers, Engineers, and C-level stakeholders, effectively translating complex technical concepts into clear business outcomes.

 - Strong experience building and managing relationships in

source_jobs.title: Account Executive - Enterprise and Strategic Accounts
source_jobs.description:
Skyflow secures the flow of data across datastores, models, and agents. Enterprises turn to Skyflow as their runtime AI data control layer to protect sensitive data, enable safe AI deployment, and unlock full value from their applications, data platforms, and AI systems.

Skyflow is trusted by Fortune 500 enterprises, and leading SaaS companies in financial services, healthcare, retail, travel and hospitality.



Skyflow is headquartered in Palo Alto, California and was founded in 2019. For more information, visit www.skyflow.com http://www.skyflow.com or follow on X https://twitter.com/SkyflowAPI and LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/skyflow/.

 

About the role:

You will be responsible for developing, managing, and closing business with Skyflow prospects. The successful candidate will have experience working on complex enterprise and strategic deals and be very capable of building instant credibility with technical buyers (CTOs, CIOs, Engineering & Product).

 

You have:

 - Experience selling to CIOs, CTOs and VPs of engineering 

 - A track record of success in closing complex enterprise and strategic deals

 - Ability to position and sell a highly technical, architecturally driven solution

 - Proactively generated your quarterly pipeline and managed large greenfield opportunities

 - Experience selling a premium ASP solution with strong expansion opportunities

 - A strong sense of curiosity and the ability to self-enable yourself

 - Impactful verbal and written communication skills with a consultative approach

 - Deep technology or data solution selling experience

 

You will:

 - Engage Skyflow prospects and demonstrate the benefits of the Skyflow Data Privacy Vault 

 - Establish a healthy pipeline for revenue and new logo acquisition in addition to penetrating your target accounts

 - Manage complex sales cycles and close deals with the assistance of our executive, product, and marketing teams

 - Negotiate contracts and close deals. 

 
Even better:

 - You have extensive experience selling technology in a specific vertical, are familiar with key players, and stay updated on emerging industry trends

 - You thrive in a startup environment where speed is essential

 - You have experience selling disruptive technology, which aligns with Skyflow's innovative approach to solving data privacy challenges



Benefits:

 - Work from home expense (U.S., Canada, and Australia)

 - Excellent Health, Dental, and Vision Insurance Options (Varies by Country)

 - Vanguard 401k

 - Flexible Paid Time Off (Unlimited)

 - Generous Equity

At Skyflow, we believe that diverse teams are the strongest teams. We invite applicants of all genders, races, ethnicities, nationalities, ages, religions, sexual orientations, disability statuses, educational experiences, family situations, and socio-economic backgrounds.

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Skyflow secures the flow of data across datastores, models, and agents. Enterprises turn to Skyflow as their runtime AI data control layer to protect sensitive data, enable safe AI deployment, and unlock full value from their applications, data platforms, and AI systems.

Skyflow is trusted by Fortune 500 enterprises, and leading SaaS companies in financial services, healthcare, retail, travel and hospitality.



Skyflow is headquartered in Palo Alto, California and was founded in 2019. For more information, visit www.skyflow.com http://www.skyflow.com or follow on X https://twitter.com/SkyflowAPI and LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/skyflow/.

 

About the role:

As the Customer Success Engineer (CSM), you will lead technical customer consultation and support, getting customers onboarded to Skyflow smoothly and effectively. You and the team of Customer Program Managers (CPM) will act as trusted advisors, providing technical guidance and best practices implementation support to our customers, helping them accelerate their time-to-value on their investment.

We enable some of the world's largest customer in their journey of protecting and governing sensitive data by demonstrating and validating how the Skyflow Privacy Vault and Privacy API uniquely enable agility, while ensuring trust and compliance.



What you have:

 - 5+ years of technical experience working on SaaS technology platforms

 - 3+ years of experience in customer-facing roles

 - Customer and Continuous Improvement Passion

 - Ability to effectively communicate complex technical concepts (Written and Verbal)

 - Working experience with cloud technologies (Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform, and/or Microsoft Azure)

 - Experience with API centric development technologies (OAS, GraphQL, REST, micro-services patterns and concepts)

 - Experience with both Client-side and Server-Side SDKs

 - Experience with Data Architectures (Databases, NoSQL data stores, ETL, Integration, etc.)

 - Application-level security experience (AuthN, AuthZ, Key Management, PBAC, ABAC, RBAC)

 - Experience in ideating solutions and working with technology partners

 - Experience working with end-users and an ability to articulate their challenges

 - An ability to execute efficiently in an ambiguous environment

 - Experience leveraging AI tools and AI-assisted development platforms (e.g., copilots, LLMs, workflow automation tools) to accelerate implementation, improve troubleshooting, and deliver customer value faster.

 - Familiarity with integrating AI-driven analytics or automation into customer-facing workflows to improve scalability, insight generation, and operational efficiency.



What you'll do:

 - Gain deep technical understanding of Skyflow’s product and integration capabilities to engage with stakeholders in customer organizations.

 - Write basic code samples for Customers to reference during implementation

 - Steward customers through the technical onboarding process

 - Initial Technical Support Point of Contact for customers during and after implementation

 - Consistently achieve successful results, even under tough circumstances

 - Show adaptability when faced with gaining support from varying audiences

 - Leverage AI tools and automation to streamline onboarding, documentation, troubleshooting, and support workflows, enabling scalable customer success operations.

 - Identify and implement AI-driven opportunities to reduce manual effort, accelerate time-to-value, and enhance proactive customer insights and engagement.

 

Benefits:

 - Work from home expense (U.S., Canada, and Australia)

 - Excellent Health, Dental, and Vision Insurance Options (Varies by Country)

 - Vanguard 401k

 - Flexible Paid Time Off (Unlimited)

 - Generous Equity

At Skyflow, we believe that diverse teams are the strongest teams. We invite applicants of all genders, races, ethnicities, nationalities, ages, religions, sexual orientations, disability statuses, educational

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative  – US Market (Based in India)
source_jobs.description:
Skyflow secures the flow of data across datastores, models, and agents. Enterprises turn to Skyflow as their runtime AI data control layer to protect sensitive data, enable safe AI deployment, and unlock full value from their applications, data platforms, and AI systems.

Skyflow is trusted by Fortune 500 enterprises, and leading SaaS companies in financial services, healthcare, retail, travel and hospitality.



Skyflow is headquartered in Palo Alto, California and was founded in 2019. For more information, visit www.skyflow.com http://www.skyflow.com or follow on X https://twitter.com/SkyflowAPI and LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/skyflow/.

 


ABOUT THE ROLE

Skyflow is looking for a highly motivated, ambitious, and results-driven Sales Development Representative (SDR) to help accelerate our growth in the US market. Based in India, you will play a critical role in generating pipeline by identifying, engaging, and qualifying prospective customers across enterprise accounts.

This is an exciting opportunity to work closely with Sales, Marketing, and senior leadership while gaining exposure to a fast-growing SaaS company serving some of the world's leading organizations. You'll be at the forefront of our outbound sales efforts, helping create new business opportunities and driving revenue growth.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Generate qualified pipeline opportunities for the US sales team through outbound prospecting efforts.

 - Research, identify, and engage decision-makers across enterprise and mid-market organizations.

 - Execute multi-channel outreach campaigns, including cold calls, emails, LinkedIn, and other prospecting channels.

 - Build and maintain a healthy pipeline of prospective customers.

 - Qualify inbound and outbound leads and schedule meetings for Account Executives.

 - Develop a strong understanding of Skyflow's products, solutions, and value proposition.

 - Collaborate closely with Marketing to optimize messaging, campaigns, and lead-generation strategies.

 - Work cross-functionally with Sales and Customer Success teams to identify target accounts and expansion opportunities.

 - Maintain accurate prospect and activity records in Salesforce and other sales tools.

 - Meet and exceed monthly and quarterly pipeline generation targets.


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - 3-5 years of experience in Sales Development, Business Development, Lead Generation, or Inside Sales within a B2B SaaS or technology company.

 - Experience prospecting and selling into the North American (US) market.

 - Strong verbal and written communication skills with the ability to engage senior stakeholders.

 - Confidence and enthusiasm for making outbound cold calls and conducting high-volume prospecting activities.

 - Ability to understand customer pain points and articulate Skyflow's value proposition effectively.

 - Self-starter mindset with strong organizational and time-management skills.

 - Experience using CRM platforms such as Salesforce and sales engagement tools.

 - Strong research, prospecting, and account-mapping capabilities.

 - Intellectual curiosity and a desire to continuously learn about technology, cybersecurity, data privacy, financial services, and healthcare industries.


PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

 - Experience prospecting into enterprise accounts and navigating complex buying committees.

 - Familiarity with account-based prospecting and multi-threading strategies.

 - Experience working with modern sales tools such as Salesforce, Outreach, Salesloft, Apollo, ZoomInfo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or similar platforms.

 - Previous experience in cybersecurity, data privacy, cloud infrastructure, or enterprise SaaS environments.


WHY JOIN SKYFLOW?

 - Remote-first and flexible work culture.

 - Opportunity to work directly with experienced sales leaders and executives.

 - Competitive compensation and performance incentives.

 - Comprehensive health benefits.

 - Generous vacation and holiday policies.

 - Home of

source_jobs.title: Product Manager, Skyflow Vault
source_jobs.description:
Skyflow secures the flow of data across datastores, models, and agents. Enterprises turn to Skyflow as their runtime AI data control layer to protect sensitive data, enable safe AI deployment, and unlock full value from their applications, data platforms, and AI systems.

Skyflow is trusted by Fortune 500 enterprises, and leading SaaS companies in financial services, healthcare, retail, travel and hospitality.



Skyflow is headquartered in Palo Alto, California and was founded in 2019. For more information, visit www.skyflow.com http://www.skyflow.com or follow on X https://twitter.com/SkyflowAPI and LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/skyflow/.

 

About the role:

As a product manager, you have a job in shipping a great product. The Skyflow product has 3 key pieces: developer facing API (which is the heart of the product), an app for managing security & administration (which provides the greatest value to paying customers), and the underlying platform, or Skyflow Vault (which sets us apart in the market in the long run). As we grow our product one key aspect is how we integrate with and build supporting technologies, so as a product manager you would be responsible for the vision, execution and success of how we expand our offering and expand into new use cases.



We know great product managers come from diverse backgrounds so no single individual may have all the desired skills on day one. But if you are the kind of PM, who would have loved to build Stripe or Twilio API's, or the Slack or Zendesk app, or the Snowflake or MongoDB platform - we want to talk to you.



You have:

 - Experience in ideating solutions and working with technology partners

 - Experience working with end users and an ability to articulate their challenges

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills

 - Having software engineering experience will be a plus

 - An ability to execute efficiently in an ambiguous environment

 - Experience managing public APIs as a product is also a plus



You will:

 - Design and develop products with specific business models in mind

 - Establish and track important product metrics to iterate effectively

 - Build future-thinking product solutions that meet more than just the current needs

 - Work closely with different parts of the organization: from partnership to sales to marketing and working through GTM motions

 - Contribute to efficient API Designs

 - Consistently achieve successful results, even under tough circumstances

 - Show adaptability when faced with gaining support from varying audiences

 - Mentor and coach more junior members to encourage growth



Benefits:

 - Excellent Health, Dental, and Vision Insurance Options (Varies by Country)

 - Unlimited PTO

 - Flexible Hours

 - Generous Equity
   
   

At Skyflow, we believe that diverse teams are the strongest teams. We invite applicants of all genders, races, ethnicities, nationalities, ages, religions, sexual orientations, disability statuses, educational experiences, family situations, and socio-economic backgrounds.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Skyflow secures the flow of data across datastores, models, and agents. Enterprises turn to Skyflow as their runtime AI data control layer to protect sensitive data, enable safe AI deployment, and unlock full value from their applications, data platforms, and AI systems.

Skyflow is trusted by Fortune 500 enterprises, and leading SaaS companies in financial services, healthcare, retail, travel and hospitality.



Skyflow is headquartered in Palo Alto, California and was founded in 2019. For more information, visit www.skyflow.com http://www.skyflow.com or follow on X https://twitter.com/SkyflowAPI and LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/skyflow/.

 

About the role:



As a Backend Software Engineer you will be responsible for developing a state-of-the-art SaaS solution that enables enterprises to govern and protect their sensitive data. You will contribute to performance engineering efforts and ensure low-latency and high-throughput transactions at scale. You will participate and be responsible for enforcing best practices in software quality, security, testing and documentation.

We know great software engineers come from diverse backgrounds so no single individual may have all the desired skills on day one. But if you are the kind of software engineer who would have loved to engineer solutions for Stripe or Twilio API's, or the Slack or Zendesk app, or the Snowflake or MongoDB platform - we want to talk to you.



You have:

 - 8+ years of experience into Software development.

 - Proficient in one or more programming languages like Go (preferred), Java, C, C++, Python

 - Experience in performance engineering: developing high-throughput, low-latency systems

 - Deep understanding of algorithms, data structures, scalability, and distributed systems

 - Privacy, authorization/authentication engineering is a huge plus

 - Experience with continuous integration, writing testable code, and test-driven development

 - Proven track record of delivering cloud-native distributed SaaS platforms at scale, and with a meaningful adoption

 - Traits such as being a fast learner, adaptable to changing landscape and most importantly a strong believer in being hands-on



You will:

 - Responsible for designing and developing Privacy APIs and backend infrastructure to support large-scale data and privacy workflows

 - Contribute to performance engineering efforts and ensure low-latency and high-throughput transactions at scale

 - Participate in building and implementing effective test strategies and developing software with high-agility and zero downtime

 - Collaborate with security and privacy engineers to deliver state-of-the-art privacy solutions



Benefits:

 - Work from home expense

 - Excellent Health Insurance Options

 - Very generous PTO

 - Flexible Hours

 - Generous Equity
   
   

At Skyflow, we believe that diverse teams are the strongest teams. We invite applicants of all genders, races, ethnicities, nationalities, ages, religions, sexual orientations, disability statuses, educational experiences, family situations, and socio-economic backgrounds.
